lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: Waaah! I lost! I gave it my all and still lost!
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: C-can I still fix this? Maybe if I hadn't used that move... Yes, I should still have a fighting chance!
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: Challenger, t-that match doesn't count! One more time, pleeeeease?
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: Wait... so... you weren't just cheering for me because I always won...?
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige
All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: No, no. Now's not the time to cry!
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: Congratulations, Challenger! Today, you've shown me the true face of brilliance.
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: Here's your reward, the second Medal of Prestige, the Splendent Medal.
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: If you're aiming for the Apex Duelist title, the next Lord of Prestige usually hangs out by the Grand Lift of Janus.
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: Hehe, now that you've defeated me, you can't lose to anyone else, you understand? I'll be waiting for the good news of you beating the Conqueror of Prestige!
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige
